changelog:
Printing:
- Booklet duplex flip now defaults to Long Edge (book-style), correct on most printers.
- Added 8/10/12/14/16-up print sizes.
- Receipt printer paper-size list filtered to sizes the printer actually supports.

WhatsApp:
- Fixed duplicate customer detection after clearing WhatsApp data.
- Fixed WhatsApp slowing down as the message log grew.
- Fixed repeated Status-update saves; added an ignore toggle.

Business Intelligence:
- Export Report now includes every dashboard figure.
- Added a date-range picker (Today/Yesterday/Week/Month/Quarter/Year/Custom).
- Added an Excel export option alongside PDF.

tips.title: What’s New
tips.body: Right-click any image and choose Crop Image to trim it before printing.

tips.title: Tip
tips.body: Add your papers in Settings -> Pricing to track material stock automatically.
